game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **WINGSPAN (FLÜGELSCHLAG):** Wingspan is a digital adaptation of a competitive engine-building board game for 1-5 players, played over four rounds, where the objective is to attract the most birds to one's nature preserve to score the highest victory points. Players interact via a tap-based interface, selecting one of four actions per turn: playing a bird card from their hand into one of three habitats (Forest, Grassland, Wetland) by paying food and egg costs, gaining food tokens, laying eggs, or drawing new bird cards. Each habitat action becomes more powerful as more birds are played into it, triggering the "When Activated" abilities of all birds in that habitat, creating powerful chain reactions. The number of available actions decreases each round, from 8 in the first to 5 in the final round, forcing strategic optimization of resource generation and bird placement. Points are accumulated from the value of played bird cards, fulfilled bonus cards, and shared end-of-round goals, with the player achieving the highest total score at the end of round four declared the winner.
game_info.description: Build your nature preserve by strategically placing birds across three habitats (Forest, Grassland, Wetland) to score the most victory points. Play birds by paying food and egg costs, activate habitat powers to gain resources, and create powerful chain reactions. The game lasts 4 rounds with decreasing actions (8→7→6→5). Score points from bird values, eggs laid, and end-of-round goals. Highest score wins!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and select habitats/actions
Space: Confirm selection, play card, or execute action
Z: Cancel current selection or go back
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including bird placement, resource management, and habitat activation. Validates that the player can perform all core actions: playing birds, gaining food, laying eggs, and drawing cards.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Alternate between gaining food and playing low-cost birds in different habitats. Test each habitat's activation powers. Ensure eggs can be laid and cards can be drawn. Verify round progression works correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully completes at least 2 rounds without errors. Player should have birds in multiple habitats, collected various food types, laid eggs, and drawn cards. Game should transition between rounds smoothly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by maximizing victory points through efficient resource management and strategic bird placement. Validates win condition and final scoring calculation.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Focus on playing high-value birds early. Prioritize Forest habitat for food generation. Build engine by chaining bird abilities. Lay eggs on valuable birds. Efficiently use all actions each round to maximize points from birds, eggs, and round goals.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state with score above 40 points within 4 rounds. Successfully demonstrates engine-building mechanics with cascading habitat activations. Final score includes points from birds, eggs, and bonus goals.

TEST_2.expected: Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state with score above 40 points within 4 rounds. Successfully demonstrates engine-building mechanics with cascading habitat activations. Final score includes points from birds, eggs, and bonus goals.
